케리아도 오늘은 버스타는구나

Keria isn’t tone deaf but he’s forcing all the work on his throat without support from his diaphragm. Thats why his voice sounds weak while she’s so powerful and also why he gassed out so early. But he’s on tune most of the time. “Legends Never Die” killed a legend today! 😅

Easiest way to engage your diaphragm is by shouting! Feel where and how you used your core. Once you know how to generate power, you can then try to add some finesse into it like changing the power of your vocal, texture, vocal projection and so on. Once you know how to engage your diaphragm you can then try to play with it. 

Once you master your diaphragm we can go onto your falsetto! Try do a loud “Wooooo” cheer, Thats basically falsetto. So again, after you know how to make that sound, add some finesse and control onto it, play with it, change the pitch up and down.

Lastly, your mixed voice! This is a little tricky as you gotta mix the 2 aforementioned techniques. You gotta use your diaphragm to generate a sound but share the burden with your nose and not just your throat. This technique allows you to sing higher than how you would normally speak! 

Also, yall done Keria dirty by pairing him up with a pro! 😂😂

FYI: Im not a music teacher, im self taught and I learned by feeling the vibrations and resonance in my own body and not by ear
